basics.name: Junteng Liu
basics.summary: First-year PhD candidate at HKUST NLP Group, focusing on Natural Language Processing and Machine Learning. Research interests include LLM Reasoning and Reinforcement Learning, Hallucination in Vision-Language Models, and LLM Truthfulness and Interpretability.

work.summary: Research internship focusing on large language models and machine learning.
Research internship advised by Zifei Shan, working on Vision-Language Models.
Research internship advised by Prof. Yu Cheng, focusing on natural language processing.

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)

publications.name: SynLogic: Synthesizing Verifiable Reasoning Data at Scale for Learning Logical Reasoning and Beyond
publications.summary: First author. A framework for synthesizing verifiable reasoning data at scale for learning logical reasoning and beyond.

publications.name: On the Perception Bottleneck of VLMs for Chart Understanding
publications.summary: First author. Investigation of perception bottleneck in Vision-Language Models for chart understanding tasks.

publications.name: On the Universal Truthfulness Hyperplane Inside LLMs
publications.summary: First author. Discovery of a universal truthfulness hyperplane inside Large Language Models.

publications.name: In-Context Sharpness as Alerts: An Inner Representation Perspective for Hallucination Mitigation
publications.summary: Co-author. Using in-context sharpness as an alert mechanism for hallucination mitigation.

publications.name: C-Eval: A Multi-Level Multi-Discipline Chinese Evaluation Suite for Foundation Models
publications.summary: Co-author. A comprehensive Chinese evaluation suite for foundation models.

publications.name: Composing Parameter-Efficient Modules with Arithmetic Operations
publications.summary: Co-author. Composing parameter-efficient fine-tuning modules using arithmetic operations.

awards.title: Zhiyuan Honor Scholarship
awards.summary: Academic honor scholarship for outstanding academic performance.
